expectations.text: Total income is correctly calculated as $10,500.00 (5500 + 3200 + 1800)
expectations.evidence: Output states 'Total Income: $10,500.00' with correct breakdown of three income sources

expectations.text: Total expenses are correctly calculated (sum of all negative amounts)
expectations.evidence: Output lists all 17 individual expenses and states 'Total Expenses: $3,338.05'

expectations.text: Spending is broken down by category with at least 5 categories shown
expectations.evidence: 9 categories listed: Housing, Insurance, Utilities, Groceries, Shopping, Transportation, Food & Drink, Health, Entertainment

expectations.text: Net cash flow / surplus is calculated (income minus expenses)
Uses pandas for the analysis rather than manual calculation
expectations.evidence: No pandas import or usage shown. Output reads the CSV directly and lists transactions manually without any data analysis library.

claims.evidence: Output lists all 17 expense transactions from the CSV

eval_feedback.overall: No suggestions - the pandas assertion correctly discriminates with_skill vs without_skill.
